title: ASR Federal Universal Fit Safety Vest High Visibility Lime Green Reflective
description:
The ASR Federal Universal Fit Safety Vest will ensure your visibility in poor weather or in the dark! This vest is constructed of durable polyester mesh, and is a bright lime green color so you'll be visible at all times. It features silver reflective tape and has a breakaway function. The vest is about 25" x 19", so it will fit just about anybody. Make sure to grab one of these to ensure your safety while jogging, biking or walking your dog!
